description.unified: Leaps into the air and deals P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for [2 sec->5 sec].

Deals P.DMG proportional to Clause's P.DEF to enemies in range and knocks them back. Reduces Hit enemies' All DEF by [24% ATK->30%] and ATK Spd by [18%->500] for [4 sec->20 sec], respectively. When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec.
Increases All allies' P.DEF, P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 300], and reduces P.DMG they take by [11%->25%] for [17 sec->20 sec]. [(removed) increases their P.Block Chance by 140]

Upon blocking, deals P.DMG to frontal enemies, decreases ATK of affected targets by [4%->20%] for [6 sec->8 sec] and [increases your Physical DEF by 6%->recovers own Mana by 300]. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by [(added) 20%] and P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 200] for [(added) 5 sec]. This effect only activates once every 10 sec.

dark.unified: In exchange for [2000 Mana Cost->1 additional Mana Cost], the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.unified: Target takes 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec. [(removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec]

dark.unified: Increases P.Block Chance by [110->250] for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: Increases All DMG the hit target takes by 20% for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown. [(removed) On block, stack up to 6 times]

dark.unified: Reduce an additional 10% of ATK. [(removed) Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec]

description.unified: [Cut Ground] Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy. [(removed) reduces Cooldown by {0}%, increases Stun duration by 1 sec]
[Shield Strike] Reduces All Crit Resistance of the affected enemy by [P.Crit Resist {0}->500] and Crit Chance by [(added) {0}] for [4 sec->10 sec]. [(removed) reduces P.DEF by 25%]
[Guardian Shield] Upon activation, removes negative effects on self, and DEF boost is increased by {0}%.
[Vow of Knights] Upon activation, heals HP by [ {0}% -> 2% ] of Max HP, and increases own P.DEF by [ (removed) duration by 3 sec -> {0}% for 5 sec ].

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK of all allies by [4% Max HP->15% ATK]. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

description.unified: Upon casting an active skill 3 times, increases P.DEF and ATK for all allies by {0}% for 15 sec. ATK boost is doubled for the ally with the highest ATK.

Summons the Soul of The Guardian, Exian, increasing P.DEF of all allies by [24%->70%] for 12 sec. For the duration of Skill, normal attacks stun the target for 1 sec and reduce its [P.DEF by 6%->All DEF by 7%] for 5 sec. The DEF Reduction effect can be stacked up to max 5 times.

1.from: Upon activation, for 12 sec, reduces P.DMG taken by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 36% and increases their ATK by 100% of Clause’s P.DEF. This effect cannot be dispelled.
1.to: Upon activation, reduces P.DMG the ally with the highest ATK takes by 80% and increases that ally's ATK by 100% of Clause's P.DEF for 12 sec. This effect is irremovable.
1.unified: Upon activation, reduces P.DMG the ally with the highest ATK takes by [36%->80%] and increases that ally's ATK by 100% of Clause's P.DEF for 12 sec. This effect is irremovable.

2.from: Upon activation, for 12 sec, increases DMG dealt by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 7%, and Normal Attacks change the target’s P.DEF reduction to {3}%.
2.to: Upon activation, increases DMG the ally with the highest ATK deals by 15% for 12 sec. Clause's normal attacks increase All DMG the target takes by 20% for 5 sec.
2.unified: Upon activation, increases DMG the ally with the highest ATK deals by [7%->15%] for 12 sec. Clause's normal attacks increase All DMG the target takes by [3% (P.DEF reduction)->20%] for 5 sec.
